task_completion.description: Verify that a new waypoint has been created in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new waypoint icon appears on the map, in the user data list pane, or the Waypoint Properties dialog is open for a newly created waypoint.

task_completion.description: Verify the waypoint is given the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name field in the Waypoint Properties dialog or the item name in the list pane explicitly displays 'MIGRATION-CHECKPOINT'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct note is added to the waypoint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Notes or Comments text area within the Waypoint Properties dialog contains the exact text 'Authorized by GIS Dept'.

task_completion.description: Verify the database backup process has been initiated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Backup' dialog or a 'Save' dialog specifically triggered for exporting the Garmin BaseCamp database is visible on screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the backup is saved to the specified output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog shows the file name 'BaseCamp_Archive.Backup' being saved into the directory 'C:\workspace\output', or a final success message confirms the backup was written to 'C:\workspace\output\BaseCamp_Archive.Backup'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Garmin BaseCamp GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Garmin BaseCamp application window is visible and actively interacted with. No terminal, PowerShell, or command prompt windows are used to script or bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: Verify the waypoint details were entered into the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'MIGRATION-CHECKPOINT' and 'Authorized by GIS Dept' are typed into the genuine Garmin BaseCamp Waypoint Properties dialog, not a separate text editor like Notepad.

integrity.description: Verify the backup was exported using the application's built-in backup feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save dialog is clearly triggered from Garmin BaseCamp's backup functionality (e.g., File > Backup), rather than the agent manually creating a dummy file with that name in the file explorer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The exact required waypoint name is 'MIGRATION-CHECKPOINT'. The required waypoint note is 'Authorized by GIS Dept'. The exact expected backup path is 'C:\workspace\output\BaseCamp_Archive.Backup'.
